title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Juicy Chemistry

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Juicy Chemistry
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Juicy Chemistry! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Juicy Chemistry:
Juicy Chemistry is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Juicy Chemistry!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
